/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libpandocommand_loader.so -o libpandocommand_loader.so CMakeFiles/pandocommand_loader.dir/default.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/users/alanuiuc/drv/p/pandocommand:/users/alanuiuc/drv/p/api: libpandocommand.so ../api/libdrvapi.so /usr/lib/libboost_coroutine.so.1.90.0 /usr/lib/libboost_context.so.1.90.0
